arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC.

cidr_block.description: The primary CIDR block for the VPC.

cidr_block_associations.description: A list of CIDR block associations for the VPC.

default.description: Indicates whether the VPC is the default VPC for the region.

dhcp_options_id.description: The ID of the set of DHCP options associated with the VPC.

enable_dns_hostnames.description: Indicates whether DNS hostnames are enabled for the VPC.

enable_dns_support.description: Indicates whether DNS resolution is supported for the VPC.

enable_network_address_usage_metrics.description: Indicates whether network address usage metrics are enabled.

id.description: The unique identifier for the VPC.

instance_tenancy.description: The allowed tenancy of instances launched into the VPC (default/dedicated).

ipv6_association_id.description: The association ID for the IPv6 CIDR block.

ipv6_cidr_block.description: The IPv6 CIDR block for the VPC.

main_route_table_id.description: The ID of the main route table associated with the VPC.

owner_id.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the VPC.

state.description: The current state of the VPC (e.g., pending, available).

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the VPC.
